intro: Heterotropa kurosawae, also known as Kuro-sawara, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Heterotropa kurosawae include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
